about.title: About PetPedia
about.subtitle: Your trusted AI-powered pet encyclopedia

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: PetPedia is dedicated to providing comprehensive, accurate, and accessible information about dog and cat breeds worldwide. We leverage AI technology to help pet owners make informed decisions about their furry companions.

dataSources.title: Data Sources
dataSources.description: We aggregate and curate data from authoritative APIs to ensure accuracy:

dogApi.name: TheDogAPI
dogApi.description: Comprehensive dog breed database with images, temperament, and characteristics

catApi.name: TheCatAPI
catApi.description: Extensive cat breed data including personality traits and health information

encyclopedia.title: Breed Encyclopedia
encyclopedia.desc: Detailed profiles for 266+ dog and cat breeds

quiz.title: Smart Recommendation
quiz.desc: AI-powered quiz to find your perfect pet match

diagnosis.title: Health Diagnosis
diagnosis.desc: Preliminary AI health analysis based on symptoms

about.disclaimer: All information provided is for educational purposes only and should not replace professional veterinary advice.

compare.title: Breed Comparison
compare.subtitle: Compare two breeds side-by-side across 10 professional dimensions
compare.sameSpeciesRequired: Both breeds must be of the same species (both dogs or both cats)

dimensions.energyDesc: How active and energetic the breed is
dimensions.groomingDesc: Time and effort required for coat maintenance
dimensions.friendlinessDesc: How sociable and friendly towards strangers
dimensions.adaptabilityDesc: How well the breed adapts to different environments
dimensions.sizeDesc: Physical size from small (3) to giant (9)

error.sameSpecies: Cannot compare different species. Please select two dogs or two cats.

quiz.notYourMatch: Not your match? Try another species!

reasonsLabel.energy_high: High energy matches your active lifestyle
reasonsLabel.energy_low: Calm temperament suits your relaxed home

overview.title: Overview
overview.content: PetPedia (operated by hellessy) respects your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding your data.

dataCollection.title: Data Collection
dataCollection.content: We use Google Analytics to understand how visitors use our site (pages visited, time on site, general location). We do not collect personal information such as names, email addresses, or payment details. Our breed data comes from TheDogAPI and TheCatAPI.

cookies.title: Cookies & Tracking
cookies.content: We use cookies for Google Analytics and Google AdSense to serve relevant advertisements and analyze traffic. You can disable cookies in your browser settings. By continuing to use this site, you consent to our use of cookies.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content: We use Google AdSense to display advertisements. Google may use cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits to this or other websites. We also use TheDogAPI and TheCatAPI as data sources for breed information.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at:
